title: John Swinney accused of 'sitting on his hands' while US uses Prestwick

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: JOHN Swinney has been urged to ban US troops from Scottish Government-owned airports amid the US-Israeli war on Iran ...

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: John Swinney accused of 'sitting on his hands' while US uses Prestwick Ross Greer accused John Swinney of inaction (Image: Holyrood TV)

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald. JOHN Swinney has been accused of "sitting on his hands" and urged to finally ban US troops from Scottish Government -owned airports amid the US-Israeli war on Iran.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – John Swinney accused of 'sitting on his hands' while US uses Prestwick Airport
